title: eriogonum shockleyi
intro: Eriogonum shockleyi, also known as Shockley's buckwheat, is a perennial shrub in the buckwheat family that is native to the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Eriogonum shockleyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and support wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Eriogonum shockleyi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, digestive problems, and respiratory issues.
